title: stachys × dordracensis
intro: Stachys × dordracensis, also known as Dordogne betony or woodland betony, is a hybrid plant species of the Stachys genus, native to the Dordogne region in southwestern France. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys × dordracensis include its potential to soothe anxiety and insomnia, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health concerns.
